mapper.update: create table if not exists beatmaps ( id integer primary key not null, setId integer not null, difficulty string not null, starRate float not null, checksum text not null )
create table if not exists beatmapsets ( id integer primary key not null, title string not null, titleUnicode string )
mapper.select: select id, setId, difficulty, starRate, checksum from beatmaps where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert or replace into beatmaps (id, setId, difficulty, starRate, checksum) values(#{id}, #{setId}, #{difficulty}, #{starRate}, #{checksum})
mapper.select: select id, title, titleUnicode from beatmapsets where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert or replace into beatmapsets (id, title, titleUnicode) values(#{id}, #{title}, #{titleUnicode})
